{{Infobox concept
| name = Worm
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Worms from a wormcloud are fat grubs the size of a man's foot with a single needle on their heads and yellow light inside them.}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
